description_text: This rare single-digit Dubai plate has been in a private collection since 2012. The seller is a verified Emirates ID holder with 32 completed transactions on Mazal. The plate is currently in Mazal custody — it will only be transferred after full payment is confirmed.
escrow_protected_desc: Plate enters Mazal custody before payment.
window_desc: Reveal fee credits toward purchase if you proceed.
liquidity_subtitle: Take a Mazal cash offer, run a certified valuation, or list to the open market. You pick the speed.
spot_cash_desc: Submit plate details, get an instant valuation and Mazal cash offer. Accepted plates move into our inventory.
val_cert_desc: An official Mazal-branded valuation certificate, downloadable PDF, independent of any sale.
marketplace_desc: List publicly or with code hidden behind the AED 1,500 reveal fee. Full Mazal escrow on every deal.
publish_desc: Every listing is escrow-backed. Choose to reveal your plate publicly or hide the digits behind a paid reveal.
boost_title: Boost your plate. Get seen by serious buyers.
boost_desc: Featured plates get 4–12× more views than standard listings. Pick a tier, pay once, and Mazal amplifies your listing across the marketplace, homepage and search.
hide_code_hint: Digits blurred until buyer pays a reveal fee.
hide_code_unavailable: Classic and retro plates have no code to hide
scan_plate: Or scan the plate — auto-fills emirate, code and digits.
tier_subtitle: All tiers include escrow protection and platform fee.
see_featured: See featured plates on the marketplace
publish_success: Your listing is live on the marketplace.
